padding-right: 20px !important; } }       LuxAlgo   на которого вы подписаны, опубликовал(а) новый скрипт (indicator)   Retest & Break Setup [LuxAlgo] The Retest & Break Setup indicator identifies and tracks price action structures where price breaks a pivot level, retests it multiple times, and subsequently breaks out to confirm the trend⁠. 🔶 USAGE The indicator identifies "Retest & Break" patterns by monitoring pivot levels (Pivot Highs for bullish setups and Pivot Lows for bearish setups)⁠. A setup begins when a pivot is broken by price⁠. The script then tracks whether price returns to "retest" this broken level as suppo

>>>>> РҝРёСҲРө:
>>>>>
>>>>>> O 14.hodine by to holo v poriadku.
>>>>>>
>>>>>> Mate zaujem o showroom v Rozhanovciach? :)
>>>>>>
>>>>>> DЕҲa ЕЎt 18.вҖҜ6.вҖҜ2026 o 19:14 Oleg Novosadov <novosadovoleg@gmail.com>
>>>>>> napГӯsala(a):
>>>>>>
>>>>>>> Dobry, ale bohuzial nemozeme zajtra doobedu, cca od  14:00? Alebo
>>>>>>> pondelok do obedu.
>>>>>>> Dakujem za pochopenie
>>>>>>>
>>>>>>> СҮСӮ, 18 СҮРөСҖРІ. 2026вҖҜСҖ. Рҫ 15:51 Posh Posh Weddings <info@poshposh.sk>
>>>>>>> РҝРёСҲРө:
>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>> ZdravГӯm Oleg,
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>> UrДҚite ГЎno, mali by ste ДҚas doobedu?
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>> ДҺakujem
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>> S pozdravom
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>> Lenka Gattiker
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>> DЕҲa ЕЎt 18.вҖҜ6.вҖҜ2026 o 15:33 Oleg Novosadov <novosadovoleg@gmail.com>
>>>>>>>> napГӯsala(a):
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>> Dobry ,
>>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>> Chcel by som sa spytat ci mate este volny termin na 26.07.2026, a
>>>>>>>>> ked Ano, ta potom mohli by sme zajtra stretnut?
>>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>> РІСӮ, 19 СӮСҖР°РІ. 2026вҖҜСҖ. Рҫ 12:09 Posh Posh Weddings <info@poshposh.sk>
>>>>>>>>> РҝРёСҲРө:
>>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>>> ZdravГӯme nevestuрҹ’ҚрҹӨҚ,
>>>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>>> ДҺakujeme veДҫmi pekne za vaЕЎu sprГЎvu.. TermГӯn svadby mГЎme eЕЎte
>>>>>>>>>> voДҫnГҪ a veДҫmi radi budeme sГәДҚasЕҘou vaЕЎej svadby.рҹӨҚ
>>>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>>> Spravidla sa s klientami stretГЎvame osobne v showroome v
>>>>>>>>>> Rozhanovciach (kГәsok od KoЕЎГӯc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladaЕҘ svadobnГә
>>>>>>>>>> vГҪzdobu a na zГЎklade toho vytvoriЕҘ cenovГә ponuku na mieru pre vГЎs ak by ste
>>>>>>>>>> mali zГЎujem prosГӯm navrhnite deЕҲ a ДҚas kedy by vГЎm to najviac vyhovovalo
>>>>>>>>>> aby sa ДҚasovo radi prispГҙsobГӯme vГЎЕЎmu ДҚasu. PoprГӯpade, ak sme mimo KoЕЎГӯc ДҚi
>>>>>>>>>> PreЕЎova, radi si s Vami dohodneme videohovor. ProsГӯm navrhnite deЕҲ a ДҚas,
>>>>>>>>>> ktorГҪ by VГЎm vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez vГӯkend aj vo veДҚernГҪch
>>>>>>>>>> hodinГЎch. рҹҷӮ NajbliЕҫsie voДҫne termГӯny mГЎme eЕЎte aj tento tГҪЕҫdeЕҲ. Forme
>>>>>>>>>> stret

74809.subject: рҹҳұ Saylor's STRC collapses
74809.body:
TodayвҖҷs newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick OвҖҷNeill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger youвҖҷll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure youвҖҷre subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

## Top Stories

**BTC** $62,614 (-2.0%) | **ETH** $1,693 (-2.7%) | **SOL** $68 (-3.6%)

* STRC falls[ as low as $82](https://x.com/Croesus_BTC/status/2067643944016486751?s=20) before recovering back over $88 вҖ” ==Saylor admits using AI to develop ==[STRC](https://x.com/CoinDesk/status/2067670392911667278)

* US Hormuz blockade ends after [deal with ](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2067589619055554595)[Iran](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2067589619055554595) gets signed вҖ” Pentagon asks for [$80B for Iran war costs](https://x.com/tradfi/status/2067792361288273975?s=20) вҖ” Vance [postpones trip](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2067800227550003295?s=20) to Switzerland for Iran talks

* Bitcoin falls below $63k as over $180M [gets liquidated](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2067640231575134453) вҖ” BTC ETFs see over [$90M in net daily outflows](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2067822912619614439?s=20)

* Franklin Templeton files for ETF that reinvests [stock dividends into BTC](https://x.com/solidintel_x/status/2067909471435685965?s=20)

* ==Intel gains ==[9%](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2067587418451001844)== on rumors of Apple chip deal==

* Co-director of the Ethereum foundation [steps down](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2067625555613090229?s=20) вҖ” Foundation could face [funding crisis](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2067800928343003267?s=20) in 3-9 months

* Kraken integrates [Solana DEX trading](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2067618291422572589?s=20) into its core app

* Solana perp DEX Phoenix TradeвҖҷs open interest hits new [ATH of $8.8M](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2067792393827443191?s=20)

* US homebuilding hits 5 year low after dropping [15.4%](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2067374478632308965)

* 50k [agentic trading accounts](https://x.com/tokens/status/2067811839090864454?s=20) have been opened on Robinhoo

* ==Rockstar opens pre-orders for ==[GTA 6](https://x.com/RockstarGames/status/2067594067030979053)== on June 25==

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”


вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

https://www.dailybones.com/p/saylor-s-strc-collapses

Fear and Greed is at
19
(Extreme
Fear)
and BTC is at
$63K
this morning. The trigger: the Fed's hawkish hold on June 17
strengthened the dollar, and that pressure compounded today when
Israel struck Lebanon despite the recently signed US-Iran peace
deal. Total market cap has slipped to $2.16T, near the yearly
low.

Around $580 million was liquidated market-wide as the selloff
cascaded. Against that backdrop, this week's accountability
stories matter even more.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

Stablecoin Issuers Will Soon Need to Verify Your ID

Five federal regulators proposed a rule this week requiring
stablecoin issuers to collect a name, address, birth date, and ID
number before opening an account, mirroring decades-old bank
rules.

The requirement only applies when customers interact directly
with issuers. Exchange trades and wallet transfers fall outside
its reach.

Why did Fed Chair Kevin Warsh abstain from voting on this rule?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/jM3xhCTP-Oqdx-T4y50sCA~~/AAQRxRA~/vHMqdB6IFwGvW39Dy-Dwk1BRzJjoimkhtifd62Db3gIKJQGmpEu9t6zuurZySFgRfRF82AJXRUMjLfjT-F8EljNxLF5LRIoeIi-vs9HLgfAPTeRC-smmcuLmn3VkCsykfkvhlRvkClPqtn14ctnyQ4qXwKmZ0ST4ssCLZphnvn1tfyy8PFT4tyAQDxQC3Nfu_t4LETTrXTi-qBk8jhYVQTG-CEZSI4iPpKIYxN2yC6c~ )
